english_text: I am good at what I do
I am in control of my life
I am getting better every day
I will not let fear hold me back
I know I can do better
korean_text: 더 잘할 수 있다는 거 알아
romanization: deo jalhal su itdaneun geo ara

english_text: I set high standards for myself
I speak up when I need to
I will not apologize for being me
I walk with my head held high
I turned my weaknesses into strengths
I am not afraid to fail
I am the best version of myself
I do not need validation from others
I am comfortable in my own skin
I own my mistakes and learn from them
I will not compare myself to others
I can adapt to any situation
I inspire others with my actions
I am not defined by my past
I show up every single day
Hard work has built my confidence
I stand tall no matter what
I am capable of great things
korean_text: 나는 대단한 일을 할 수 있어
romanization: naneun daedanhan ireul hal su isseo

english_text: I will shine in my own way
